title: Edison Design System from General Electric
content: # General Electric Systems Directories Components Articles Blueprints Guides Glossary Subscribe Edison from Directories: Components: Edison Design System is a comprehensive framework that guides the design and development of healthcare-related products and solutions by General Electric Healthcare. It ensures consistency, usability, and a seamless user experience across their medical devices and software applications. Design System incorporates industry best practices and user-centered design principles, ultimately enhancing the quality and effectiveness of healthcare technologies offered by GE.
